commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review should require real or diagnostic delivery proof for the external-channel fallback; there is no remaining narrow automation repair after the queued regression coverage was added.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain issue was found; the diff reuses existing channel routing and does not add dependencies, workflow changes, secrets handling, or new code-execution paths. (sha=2daee097ad07cb925ae7474fc2eb8a28bf275768)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `routeReply` fallback delivery for compaction `notifyUser` and hook notices when no block-reply callback exists, plus active-turn and queued-followup regression tests.

PR surface: Source +145, Tests +357. Total +502 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current `main` drops active compaction notices when `onBlockReply` is absent, and current queued followups lack the new notifyUser delivery branch. I did not run a live failing channel scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should require real or diagnostic delivery proof for the external-channel fallback; there is no remaining narrow automation repair after the queued regression coverage was added.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): route compaction notices without block replies
target.body:
## Summary
- Route `agents.defaults.compaction.notifyUser` notices through the originating channel when an active block-reply callback is unavailable.
- Preserve the existing `onBlockReply` path for live streaming turns.
- Keep notice delivery non-fatal if there is no routable origin or the fallback send fails.

## Linked context
Closes #88933

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
- Behavior or issue addressed: compaction notices with `notifyUser: true` were silently dropped when a compaction event ran without `opts.onBlockReply`.
- Real environment tested: Linux contributor checkout; focused OpenClaw auto-reply tests.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Evidence after fix: targeted regression passes and asserts the no-`onBlockReply` path calls `routeReply` with the compaction notice, origin channel, destination, `replyKind: "block"`, and `mirror: false`.
- Observed result after fix: `agent-runner-execution.test.ts` passed 153 tests.
- What was not tested: a live WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord compaction delivery.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this contributor environment cannot safely trigger a real user-channel compaction notice without using private local channel/account state.
- Before evidence: current source returned early from `sendCompactionNotice` whenever `params.opts?.onBlockReply` was absent.

## Tests and validation
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check -- src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts`

## Risk checklist
Did user-visible behavior change? `Yes`
Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? `No`
Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? `Yes`
Highest-risk area: fallback delivery sends an additional notice through the origin route when block streaming is unavailable. The mitigation is to require a routable origin, avoid transcript mirroring for the notice, keep failures non-fatal, and preserve the old callback path when present.

## Current review state
Ready for maintainer review. Waiting on CI and any maintainer-requested live channel proof.

### Maintainer update (2026-06-01)

Pushed maintainer follow-up `2daee097ad0` on the contributor branch.

Behavior covered:
- active-run default compaction notices route back to the origin when `onBlockReply` is unavailable;
- active-run hook-provided compaction notices use the same origin-route fallback instead of disappearing;
- queued/proactive compaction notices route to the origin when no block callback exists;
- metadata-only queued compactions still emit the `notifyUser` completion notice even with no final assistant payload;
- queued notices resolve `replyToId` from the queued/origin message and still respect channel `replyToMode: off`.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts` - 225 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts` - passed.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts` - passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` and `git diff --check` - passed.
- L2 tmux proof: `L2_COMPACTION_HEAD=2daee097ad07`, `L2_COMPACTION_EXIT=0 vitest=0 lint=0 diff=0`.
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Testbox changed gate: `tbx_01kt0zjajcskh28swephbxbxmt`, provider `blacksmith-testbox`, lanes `core, coreTests`, exit 0.

Remaining proof gap: this run did not capture live Telegram/WhatsApp/Discord visible compaction delivery, so the Mantis visible-proof label still applies.


## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: compaction `notifyUser` and hook-message notices no longer disappear when `onBlockReply` is unavailable; queued/proactive compaction notices route to the originating channel, carry the intended reply target when allowed, respect `replyToMode: off`, and metadata-only queued compactions still emit completion notices.
- Real environment tested: PR head `2daee097ad0` in maintainer Testbox plus independent L2 shell proof against the same head.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`, plus focused L2/local commands listed in the maintainer update above.
- Evidence after fix: copied console output from the maintainer Testbox and L2 runs:

```text
L2_COMPACTION_HEAD=2daee097ad07
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  225 passed (225)
L2_COMPACTION_EXIT=0 vitest=0 lint=0 diff=0

provider=blacksmith-testbox id=tbx_01kt0zjajcskh28swephbxbxmt sync=delegated auth=blacksmith
[check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests
[check:changed] src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts: core production
[check:changed] src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.ts: core production
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
blacksmith run summary sync=delegated command=2m19.833s total=2m26.856s exit=0
Testbox tbx_01kt0zjajcskh28swephbxbxmt stopped (completed)
```

- Observed result after fix: focused auto-reply proof, L2 proof, clean autoreview, and Testbox changed gate all passed on the pushed head; no remaining accepted/actionable autoreview findings.
- What was not tested: live visible Telegram/WhatsApp/Discord compaction delivery was not captured in this run; the Mantis visible-proof label remains for that channel-recording proof.
target.author: charles-openclaw

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
